CY-Bench multi-model local dashboard

Model comparison

Click a column header to sort. Lower NRMSE and higher R² are better. Fixed colors use absolute thresholds (NRMSE 0–0.5, r/R² 0–1).

Drill-down plots

Click a table row to inspect plots.
Ground truth (mean yield)
Model prediction
